atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain following a refrigerator move.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports back pain that began five days ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as being on the lower right side of his back.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking ibuprofen and occasionally Tylenol with ibuprofen for the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any neurological symptoms such as numbness or tingling in his legs.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any chest, abdominal, or other systemic symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals pain to palpation of the right lumbar spine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals decreased flexion and extension.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals a positive straight leg raise on the right.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's presentation is most consistent with a lumbar strain, likely secondary to the recent injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The prior discectomy is not concerning at this time.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam 15 mg once daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ultram 50 mg every four hours as needed for pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers the patient to physical therapy
